payload.input_str: {'sql': "SELECT s.Name, s.Capacity FROM concert c JOIN stadium s ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year > '2013' GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;"}

final.final_sql: SELECT s.Name, s.Capacity FROM concert c JOIN stadium s ON c.Stadium_ID = s.Stadium_ID WHERE c.Year > '2013' GROUP BY s.Stadium_ID ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
